current_record.title: Use HeightMap for terrain elevation
current_record.body: All terrain elevation stored in HeightMap component. GridManager reads height via HeightMap.GetHeight(cell).

input.proposed_change: Clarify that HeightMap.GetHeight returns normalized float 0..1, not raw int. Update body to reflect this.

aligned_record.title: Use HeightMap for terrain elevation
aligned_record.body: All terrain elevation stored in HeightMap component. GridManager reads height via HeightMap.GetHeight(cell), which returns a normalized float in range 0..1.

output.rationale: The proposed change adds a missing precision detail (return type range) without altering the decision's outcome or approach.
